title: Add UNDRIVEN check on 2-D and unpacked arrays

features.name: 2d unpacked array with parameter-sized first dimension
features.description: Code should include a 2-D unpacked array declaration where the packed dimension size is a module parameter expression like C_NOI/2

features.name: generate localparam computed from genvar
features.description: Code should include a generate loop with a localparam that is computed from the genvar, causing the parameter value to change per loop iteration
features.snippet:
for (genvar lvl = 0; lvl < C_ALVLS; lvl++) begin: add_levels
  localparam int C_NUM_ADDERS = C_NOI/2 >> lvl;

features.name: conditional generate with lvl-dependent array index
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop with conditional branches (if-else) that assign to array indices based on the loop level variable, creating partial drives of unpacked arrays

features.name: unpacked array slice assignment in generate
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array assignment where only a slice of the array is driven, leaving other elements potentially undriven
